entries.claim: TokioIo and AsupersyncIo bridge poll_read and poll_write while refusing blanket cancel-safety for read_exact and write_all.
entries.proof_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_xeh8m0_6_tokio_io cargo test -p asupersync-tokio-compat --features tokio-io io::tests::tokio_io_tests -- --nocapture
required_markers: `read_exact` and `write_all` are NOT cancel-safe through either adapter

unsupported_claims.evidence_marker: `read_exact` and `write_all` are NOT cancel-safe through either adapter
does NOT require a running Tokio runtime

entries.claim: Browser main thread and dedicated worker direct runtime remain checked support, while service worker and shared worker direct runtime fail closed to explicit reason codes.
entries.proof_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_asupersync_rckwas_contract cargo test -p asupersync --test wasm_browser_support_boundary_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture

validation_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_xeh8m0_6_adapter_browser_cookbook CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test adapter_browser_fail_closed_cookbook_contract -- --nocapture
